# Summary

Please describe your changes clearly.

What does this PR improve or fix?

---

# Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] UX/UI improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor

---

# Screenshots / Videos

If your PR includes UI changes, please attach screenshots or recordings.

Mobile screenshots are especially appreciated 📱

---

# Checklist

- [ ] I tested my changes locally
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`
- [ ] I ran `npm run format`
- [ ] My changes are responsive/mobile-friendly
- [ ] I kept the existing UX/design consistency
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed
